name: conflict record includes an ISO-8601 timestamp at which the conflict was surfaced
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","matched_rule_id":"r-x","classification":"conflict"}\n' > decision.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/surface-conflict.sh" --decision decision.json --log pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"surfaced_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"' pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
